title: ACME Support Design Document
summary: Technical design for automatic TLS certificate management via ACME (HTTP-01/DNS-01) for the router-hosts server.
notes: Design doc with per-decision rationale and config schemas; competes between ADR (design decisions with rationale) and SPEC (config contracts, challenge tables). Resolved to SPEC since it defines implementation contracts across many decisions rather than a single locked decision in ADR format.
